'''sakono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placentoside|placentoside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placentoside|placentoside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sakono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sækeneth|sækeneth]] || [[word:sækenej|sækenej]] || [[word:sækenesh|sækenesh]] || [[word:sækene|sækene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakokonoth|sakokonoth]] || [[word:sakokonoj|sakokonoj]] || [[word:sakokonosh|sakokonosh]] || [[word:sakokono|sakokono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakonoth|sakonoth]] || [[word:sakonoj|sakonoj]] || [[word:sakonosh|sakonosh]] || [[word:sakono|sakono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakofnoth|sakofnoth]] || [[word:sakofnoj|sakofnoj]] || [[word:sakofnosh|sakofnosh]] || [[word:sakofnof|sakofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sakonotho|sakonotho]] || [[word:sakonojo|sakonojo]] || [[word:sakonosho|sakonosho]] || [[word:sakonoko|sakonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sakonoth|sakonoth]] || [[word:sakonoj|sakonoj]] || [[word:sakonosh|sakonosh]] || [[word:sakono|sakono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sakonothol|sakonothol]] || [[word:sakonojol|sakonojol]] || [[word:sakonoshol|sakonoshol]] || [[word:sakonokol|sakonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sakonothotho|sakonothotho]] || [[word:sakonojojo|sakonojojo]] || [[word:sakonoshosho|sakonoshosho]] || [[word:sakonoko|sakonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sakonothon|sakonothon]] || [[word:sakonojon|sakonojon]] || [[word:sakonoshon|sakonoshon]] || [[word:sakonokon|sakonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sakonothoro|sakonothoro]] || [[word:sakonojoro|sakonojoro]] || [[word:sakonoshoro|sakonoshoro]] || [[word:sakonokoro|sakonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
